title: Lead Investment Banker at Haribhakti & Co

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Haribhakti & Co
jsonLd.description:
We at Haribhakti & Co are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Haribhakti & Co:
Haribhakti & Co is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co!
